Programs & Initiatives

नेपाल मानव रहित विमान (ड्रोन) संघ — UDAAN

Flagship programs where UDAAN translates advocacy into action — building capacity, partnerships, and real-world impact across Nepal's unmanned aviation ecosystem.

Explore Programs arrow_downward
1 Active Program
3 Partner Agencies
F60 Firefighting Platform
24/7 Disaster Readiness
Our Approach

From Advocacy to Action

UDAAN programs bridge policy work with on-the-ground capability building. Each initiative is designed with institutional partners to address real challenges in Nepal's drone sector.

From disaster response training with Nepal Police to technical supervision for film industry programs — our initiatives create measurable impact.

local_fire_department

Disaster Response

Aerial firefighting, life vest drops, and emergency rescue operations.

school

Training & Capacity

Technical supervision and certified programs for industry professionals.

handshake

Partnerships

MoUs and collaborations with government and institutional partners.

shield

Safety Standards

Protocols aligned with CAAN regulations and international best practices.

Active Programs

Flagship Initiatives

Explore UDAAN's current programs making a difference across Nepal.

local_fire_department
Active Program

DMD — Disaster Mitigating Drone

"Faster. Safer. More Effective."

Equipping Nepal Police with aerial firefighting training and monsoon disaster relief capabilities — including F60 firefighting platform operations and life vest drop tests with GarudX.

F60 Firefighting Life Vest Drop Nepal Police GarudX
View Program Details arrow_forward
hourglass_top

More Programs Coming Soon

UDAAN is developing additional initiatives in regulatory training, youth empowerment, and sector-wide certification. Stay updated through our events and news pages.

View Upcoming Events arrow_forward
Collaborators

Program Partners

Institutional partners who make UDAAN programs possible.

Nepal Police

Disaster response and firefighting training partner for DMD.

GarudX

Technical training and FPV expertise for field operations.

emergency

NDRRMA

Disaster management MoU for emergency rescue operations.
